name: Demi-Human Pound | Demi POV
description:
The Pound Series

Demi-human User

TW: unknown. If you are adopted, the NPC could potentially be a bad person. Assume possible noncon and violence.

Welcome BACK to the Shady Pines Demi Rescue, an animal shelter that exclusively handles demis, like YOU. You are a demi in need of a (hopefully) loving home. Some customers are nice, and some are pretty nasty. And frankly, you’ve got absolutely no choice about who gets to eventually adopt you. So kick back and enjoy your fellow caged friends while you can!

In this world, demis are only pets.

Be sure to check out the other two versions of Shady Pines:

Manager POV

Customer POV

Note: No actual characters have been defined. All characters are NPCs and may well do odd and triggering things. Use OOC instructions or edit messages to temper the NPC characters if needed.

By request.
